creator: donaldcallen@gmail.com
text:
There is a possibly related additional issue here.

If I disconnect the backup disk prior to system startup, to avoid the problem described in this PR, and then plug the disk in when the system is up, I cannot mount it. 'zfs mount <filesystem label>' fails. 'zpool status <filesystem label>' says it knows nothing about the filesystem. The only way I can get this filesystem mounted is to have the disk plugged in on startup and then go through the umount-mount sequence to get it mounted properly.
